awardsSection.title: Two 2026 Telly Award wins for Gen AI-driven education work.
awardsSection.description: Recognized in the Telly Awards Non-Broadcast category for Craft - Use of Generative AI, highlighting education-focused motion work built around learner motivation, syllabus strategy, and production-quality delivery.

awards.title: Maximizing Your Education: Finding Your Purpose
awards.category: Non-Broadcast / Craft - Use of Generative AI
awards.brief: An education-focused motion piece designed to help learners connect their study journey to purpose, clarity, and personal motivation.

awards.title: Maximizing Your Education: Making the Syllabus Your Superpower
awards.category: Non-Broadcast / Craft - Use of Generative AI
awards.brief: A course module built to make syllabus planning feel practical and empowering through Gen AI-assisted visuals, motion graphics, audio, SFX, final edit, and QA.

leadershipSection.title: I reduce creative risk by owning motion from brief to shipped asset.
leadershipSection.description: For senior motion roles, the value is not only polished animation. I bring the operating layer around the work: translating briefs, planning production, leading people, setting review standards, managing feedback and shipping assets that are ready for product, learning, brand and stakeholder teams.

strengths.title: Motion Leadership
strengths.description: Led and coordinated a 10+ person creative team across design, animation, editing, audio, SFX and delivery tasks.

strengths.title: Product Storytelling
strengths.description: Turn product, learning and brand briefs into clear narratives, visual flows, storyboards and motion-ready execution plans.

strengths.title: Pipeline Ownership
strengths.description: Built repeatable workflows for Gen AI visuals, motion graphics, audio prep, edit reviews, final QA and handoff.

strengths.title: Stakeholder Delivery
strengths.description: Managed feedback loops, quality checks, consistency standards and final exports so teams could ship reliably.

strengths.title: Production Velocity
strengths.description: Improved delivery speed by building reusable structures, review checkpoints and AI-assisted production workflows.

strengths.title: Quality Control
strengths.description: Own final checks across pacing, audio sync, visual consistency, export settings and stakeholder-ready delivery.

experiences.title: Sr. Motion Graphics Designer - Team Lead
highlights: Lead a 10+ person creative team across motion design, editing, audio, SFX and delivery
Built repeatable production workflows that improved delivery speed by 40-50%
Translate SaaS, learning and brand briefs into storyboards, motion systems and stakeholder-ready assets
Integrated Gen AI workflows into production while keeping creative direction, QA and final delivery human-led

experiences.title: Motion Graphics Lead - Head of Production
highlights: Led motion design and production for a YouTube network with 2.6M+ subscribers
Delivered 300+ explainer and branded videos with strong retention-focused pacing
Built internal motion pipelines, reusable animation structures and review workflows
Managed creative execution from concept and storyboard through edit, sound, QA and final delivery

experiences.title: Associate Process Manager - AR Motion
highlights: Managed AR product animation pipeline from CAD to visualization
Handled global brand clients across broadcast and digital

experiences.title: Motion Graphics Designer
highlights: Designed animated sequences and UI elements for LMS modules
Developed reusable templates to accelerate production

caseStudy.label: Case Study
caseStudy.title: Motion Systems for Product, Learning and Brand Teams
caseStudy.description: Production-grade modules and motion assets led through brief, story, storyboard, Gen AI workflow, animation, SFX, QA and delivery.

hero.body: I help product, learning and brand teams turn complex ideas into clear motion systems, explainers and launch-ready video assets. 6+ years across motion leadership, 300+ videos and course assets produced, 10+ person creative teams led, and end-to-end ownership across story, storyboard, Gen AI workflows, animation, audio, SFX, QA and stakeholder-ready delivery.

clientsSection.title: Brand motion built for teams people already trust.
